What We Do

Crafted for Every Space

View All Services

01

Furniture Reupholstery

Sofas, chairs, chaises — reborn in Sunbrella, Crypton, or your own COM fabric. Every piece stripped, re-sprung, and hand-finished.

Explore

02

Window Treatments

Pinch pleat draperies, Roman shades, and canopy treatments — measured, sewn, and installed precisely for First Coast homes.

Explore

03

Custom Headboards

Tufted, channel-stitched, or nailhead-trimmed. Custom bed frames built to exact dimensions — from a single headboard to a full upholstered bed.

Explore

04

Commercial Upholstery

Full restaurant fit-outs, hotel seating, office interiors — commercial-grade fabrics and marine vinyl, installed on your schedule.

Explore

05

Custom Built-Ins

Banquettes, window seats, and built-in seating designed from scratch — frame, foam, and fabric, built to the exact radius of your space.

Explore

How It Works

Simple.
Personal.
Precise.

Seventeen years of refinement has produced a process that's transparent, stress-free, and built around you. Visit our Atlantic Beach showroom or call us — we'll handle the rest.

(904) 242-8778
01

Free Consultation

Call or visit our showroom at 1079 Atlantic Blvd #7, Atlantic Beach. We assess your piece, understand your vision, and provide a written estimate — typically within 24 hours.

02

Fabric Selection

Browse 300+ swatches in person — from Sunbrella outdoor weaves and Crypton performance fabrics to Belgian linens, velvets, and marine-grade vinyls. We guide every decision. Also visit .

03

Expert Crafting

Every stitch by hand. Every seam matched. Every detail finished with precision in our Atlantic Beach workshop — then delivered white-glove to your home or commercial space across the First Coast.
